arts.ttl: Eventful final days of window possible with Tottenham keen on Breel Embolo
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are being linked with Breel Embolo, as French newspaper L’Equipe reports the final days of the window could be eventful for the forward and his club AS Monaco. The 27-year-old has made 26 appearances for Monaco so far this season, rarely playing the full 90 minutes for his club.
